findings.message: removeLoanTransactionsForItem fast path missing isOccupantEmpty signal — hook cannot determine whether to null-write occupant node with only matchingTxnIds.
removeOccupantIfEmptyAndUpdate left on fallback read path despite loansState having the data. Conflicts with Goal 2.
Test scope only covers useLoansMutations.test.ts — LoanDataContext.test.tsx exercises the same wrappers being changed; no proof wrapper passes params correctly.
Validation commands should use scoped pnpm --filter @apps/reception typecheck / lint rather than generic commands.
Risks table contradicts updated TASK-02 (removeOccupantIfEmptyAndUpdate now passes isEmpty).
Consumer tracing missing isOccupantEmpty param for removeLoanTransactionsForItem.
Overall acceptance criteria missing removeOccupantIfEmptyAndUpdate wrapper requirement.

note: No Critical findings. Score 8/10 = lp_score 4.0 = credible. Fixes applied. No R3 needed.
